ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of clothing (e.g., tops, bottoms) */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size equivalent */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* UK size equivalent */,
  "aus_size" TEXT /* AUS size equivalent */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size is intended for */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the size is intended for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_size_category FOREIGN KEY ("size_category") REFERENCES size_categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., tops, bottoms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the category is intended for */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the category is intended for */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "preferred_size_category" TEXT /* Preferred category of clothing (e.g., tops, bottoms) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Preferred size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve" REAL /* Sleeve measurement in inches */,
  "length_in" REAL /* Length measurement in inches */,
  "length_cm" REAL /* Length measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam_in" REAL /* Inseam measurement in inches (for bottoms) */,
  "inseam_cm" REAL /* Inseam measurement in centimeters (for bottoms) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of clothing (e.g., tops, bottoms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is intended for */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the product is intended for */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size available in stock */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size is intended for */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the size is intended for */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the size is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "is_gift" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the order is a gift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is intended for */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the product is intended for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the fit of the product (1-5) */,
  "size_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the size (e.g., fits true to size, runs small) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the customer */,
  "fit_rating_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the fit rating */,
  "size_accuracy_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the size accuracy rating */,
  "date_provided" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
